acmpca.certificate.policyinformation.Cer.Description: Specifies the object identifier (OID) of the certificate policy under which the certificate was issued. For more information, see NIST's definition of [Object Identifier (OID)](https://csrc.nist.gov/glossary/term/Object_Identifier).

acmpca.certificate.policyinformation.Pol.Description: Modifies the given `CertPolicyId` with a qualifier. ACM Private CA supports the certification practice statement (CPS) qualifier.
